title: submit essay with valid data
description: Test the /submit POST endpoint by submitting an essay with all required fields including student_id, assignment_title, content, wpm, and paste_count. Verify that the response returns a success message and a score indicating validation of typing speed and paste count.

title: submit essay with missing required fields
description: Test the /submit POST endpoint by submitting an essay request missing one or more required fields such as student_id or wpm. Verify that the API returns an appropriate error response indicating missing required fields.

title: submit essay with invalid wpm and paste count
description: Test the /submit POST endpoint by submitting an essay with invalid or anomalous wpm and paste_count values (e.g., extremely high or negative values). Verify that the API detects anomalies and returns an error or warning message accordingly.

title: get all essay submissions
description: Test the /submissions GET endpoint to retrieve all stored essay submissions. Verify that the response returns an array of submissions with correct data fields and that the data matches what was submitted previously.
